title: Yijing Hexagram 34: Da Zhuang (Power of the Great)
description: Hexagram 34 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 34 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Power of the Great. Perseverance furthers. Thunder in heaven above.
